I received about 5 quotes from different business. We chose Neil and his company because he was very well informed of what needed to be done and was in align with how we wanted it completed. They were prompt, courteous and left our yard with no mess. I would highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jonathan Coons","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIB_gvmO3ngULwDVVyCNHPfljueYslOCP_fqc623eeTyUwrnA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When I set out to get quotes done for my roof replacement, I got quotes from several different contractors including all of the frequently seen names throughout the city.

I was extremely impressed with the customer service provided by Neil from the initial phone call to setup the quote. The overall cost of the job was right in line to the other quotes I received (not the most expensive or the cheapest) however Neil was the only contractor who called and emailed to explain the quote and also noticed that my attic was under ventilated.

After accepting Neil's bid, I was impressed with his constant communication updating me on the project knowing that I needed to have the roof replacement done before the snow fell.

Once the job started, the work was fast and the workmanship was impeccable. I was impressed with the updates that Neil provided throughout the day and the photos he emailed updating the progress. Part of my decking was really rotten and he left out some pieces of the roof removed to show me just how bad it was. The shingles look great, the architectural ridge cap looks fantastic and the aluminum fascia they installed is really beautiful.

When going over the job with me afterwards, Neil pointed out a potential issue with my chimney in case I wasn't aware of it (I wasn't) so I could have it looked at.

If I only had one complaint, and it's a very very minor nitpick, it's that the eaves trough and downspout were installed a few days after Neil's initial estimated install date. The workmanship though and the quality of the product installed were fantastic. Despite the minor delay, Neil kept me updated on the progress and estimated install date via email. Like I said, it's an incredibly small nitpick and it's the only piece of criticism I could provide about my experience with Neil and Thunder Bay Roofing Ltd.

Neil was extremely flexible with shift work schedule and arranging to meet to discuss the bid and payment.

I would recommend Thunder Bay Roofing without hesitation to anyone looking for a roofing renovation. The customer service, quality of work and the products used are impeccable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emily Carr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL03ybBmFAg1zjns_i2l-YWf8Dlqiw11rRTR17hhFWvxGYA5w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Professional, reliable, quality service. We gathered 3 quotes and chose Thunder Bay Roofing because they took the time to visit our home, review the entire project with us, answer our questions, and explain upgrades they suggested (which have improved air flow in our attic).  Work was completed in a timely, professional manner, and they took the time to ensure they left our home clean after the job was completed. Thunder Bay Roofing definitely takes pride in their work, and they are happy when their customers are happy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"H L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSF-tv-vdL2d2IASWztXB-0xUDJo9gk3EIbl-59vdQuLscvg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent business. Was even amazed with the clean up after no nails in my yard nothing. Would totally recommend Reno Bros to anyone needing roof repair or even new shingles. Thanks Mike , Shawn and crew.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nancy Allard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRnLWuG2_YyuXzKiuyDu7I0WzvlsFHhLtXfUApFH1L5fqNG1i5gw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I do not recommend this business at all. Maybe they are good at roofing in which case they should change their company name to Roofing bros. But the customer service I experienced was less than satisfactory. I'm telling my story in case these red flags come up for you. Beware of empty promises with no communication. Last spring I wanted siding work done and requested a quote. Red flags that I should have caught on to but gave them the benefit of the doubt because they came recommended by a family friend who had their roof done. When I had my estimate done I was told by the fella in conversation and while taking measurements that he rolled the company truck so they were one truck down. Hmmmm but the price was right so I proceeded. I met up with Jessie at a Tim Hortons parking lot to sign the contract for the work to be completed. Not sure they even have an office, I'd be curious to know. i was told they were booked for the summer so the work would have to wait till the fall when the roofing season ends and I was \"first onthe list\" ( beware of these words). Ok no problem as long as it is done before the snow flies. I was promised. The fall came and went, and the snow started to fly. I initiated contact to see what was happening. Voice mailbox full so I reach out through messenger. I was met with excuses, hardships were shared and a promise that I'd be \"first on the list\" in the spring. So spring arrives, I check out their Facebook page and see they have started work for the season so I ask why I havent been contacted since I was \"first onthe list\". I was met with more hardship excuses with no apology expressed. Turns out they could not do the job. They had no one to complete the work. Talked about shortages all over Ontario and so on. Well I am happy to say that by the end of June, my work is finally complete no thanks to Reno Bros and I didnt have to wait nor did I hear complaints of hardships or be given empty promises. It was a smooth transition of service which is how it should be. I will always caution people to beware of Renos Bros. I'm pretty reasonable and understanding, afterall things happen, but this was ridiculous!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aria Eya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRpHuzAN4oVwNtsrQNBrBgxYkgG2sUA1K3PjaVFI5luFam7iZp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had a leak in my roof that caused water damage in the interior of my home. He explained everything in detail and answered all of my questions. The estimator went above and beyond by doing some additional repairs that were not included in the original estimate to ensure that my family could stay in our home until repairs were complete. I would highly recommend this service for any roofing or leak repair needs!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6beeixr59IzL40-n4jaICnL-0JkE0kQjMmZXuEH68c8d0nh4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome crew! address: 1249 Rosslyn Rd, Thunder Bay, ON P7E 6V9
open_hours: {"Friday":["Closed"],"Monday":["9 a.m.–4 p.m."],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["9 a.m.–4 p.m."],"Tuesday":["9 a.m.–4 p.m."],"Wednesday":["9 a.m.–4 p.m."]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Gen Beauce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISrgBLTtOoxPTr8_KztmRxN-fxKBGxxLFWdTCFQZJtQ2y3iQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Update in response to the company’s reply:

I would like to clarify a few factual points.

My written contract does not state that drip edge was “excluded.” I have reviewed the agreement, and there is no clause indicating that drip edge would not be installed. I also verbally requested drip edge at the time of booking.

The contract specifies that weather shield would be replaced where needed. It was not.

When I contacted the owner directly to resolve these concerns, I was told that if he inspected the roof and found it to be fine, I would be charged $500. He later stated he was “just giving my dad a hard time.” I did not find that appropriate or professional.

I was also told that drip edge is uncommon in Thunder Bay. Regardless of regional practices, my concern is that I requested it and expected the work to reflect both the contract and standard roofing practices.

I am currently experiencing water coming through to the soffit, which has only increased my concern about the missing drip edge and overall installation details.

My intention in leaving this review is not to be confrontational, but to provide accurate information for other homeowners making significant financial decisions. I attempted to resolve this directly with the company prior to posting the original review.

I stand by my experience.

Dykstra Knight refused to intsall drip edge on my new roof. I requested it, and my understanding is that is required by code in Ontario.  Either way, I found them unprofessional and rude. When my father spoke with the owner, he told him he would charge me 500$ if he came to inspect the job and found it to be fine.  I mean, the drip edge is not there... when I spoke to him, he said he as just giving my dad a hard time because he's "old" and "didnt know the right words for things".  My dad is francophone, 76 yrs old, and his family owns a construction business in Montreal area.   The owner then told me , "yeah, this isnt Southern Ontario, its Thunder Bay, most of the houses dont have drip edge".  I guess because we are in Thunder Bay, we are supposed to accept that contractors will do subpar work?  It was pretty awful, and as a single mom, I have to say that there are few trustworthy contractors out there. This is not one.  I went to Home Hardware to purchase the material for drip edge (12 dollars or so for about 10 ft).  I told them the contractor had refused to install and they were shocked....  Perhaps my fault that I didnt realize it had to be specified in the contract, I assumed it was a given that work would be to code, and I verbally requested it when I booked the work. And even if Im wrong and its not required for code, any basic google search will support the fact that its the right thing to do. Anyway, Im glad for those who had a good experience, but that definitely was not the case for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brandon Wright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWowIeeBvA6HJGfFwDLtm7lg33GrlZSyj-6Ps4CFbTZ3Be7neg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ken and Jessie from Dykstra Knight came by today after the storm to remove a tree from my roof and patch up holes while I wait for my insurer to contact me. They arrived promptly and were very professional and adept at removing debris. They were also helpful in guiding my wife and I through the ordeal. I would highly recommend their services to anyone in need. I hope they return to make more permanent repairs once our claim is approved.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Marler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKCiq9rWsxGQyGlwKjicd814I2VC1zLERviYdI1esqa2FltVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dykstra Knight Roofing did a great job replacing the shingles on our roof. From the initial call and quick quote, to the final moments of the job they were friendly, hard working and professional. Our roof took a week to complete with the crew working full days. The weather wasn't great during the job, and they worked carefully to ensure the "under" roof was never exposed to the rain (and snow). The clean-up was very good. Our roof looks beautiful with its new shingles. I would hire them again, and recommend them for your roofing job without hesitation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Colleen MacGregor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyjbyF5Vj5TSoDvVD7jRL-RhIlVyQ1INuFBCYsB28ILckvpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just had our roof, garage and shed reroofed. Great job! Looks wonderful. The crew was friendly and polite. The clean up was very well done making sure no nails were left for our pet to step on. The young lady at the front desk was extremely helpful and patient in helping us pick out a colour and type of shingle. Thanks for a stress free experience and prompt service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike Bolton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWkejs2g4p2pPzCNd7uYnLBTTsLvhBqbRmg0eTtcTYXYWSVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"AMAZING service!! Had 5 of our rental properties with leaking roofs within one week and Dykstra was on site super-quick. Cleared off all affected areas. Provided before & after pictures. Everyone at this company is very professional and you can tell they genuinely care. Very reasonable prices too. We also use them for new roof installs during Spring/Summer. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sara Hill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwpJOgI52s65Xa030q_RgNWtejf_nIgtfUHSMpvNiSk1PVXLs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dykstra Knight roofers updated our roof last spring and we couldn’t be happier! Their hardworking crew was in and out within 2 days, leaving us with a beautiful high quality roof. The staff was kind and professional, and did a great cleanup afterwards. Strongly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marco Cupelli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhsPgo0NbC-gWHLIyefX9He6YuyYFHKg6HL0QQQv17swlrxxvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"An overall poor experience from Dykstra Knight Roofing. Our property management company engaged Dykstra to send a crew member to inspect, provide feedback and repair the leak to the roof accurately. When I had inspected the quality of the work once completed by walking on the roof and in the attic it was very obvious that the repairman did not accurately repair the holes to the roof. It would have been beneficial if the company took the time to truly inspect and suggest to myself the best means of repair so that we could have a safe winter at the property.

This was not the case as the repairman quickly applied some caulking (photo attached) to an area, wiped his hands clean and the company invoiced me for the "work." I had re-inspected, found the holes and provided photos to the owner the company stating that this should be repaired immediately to ensure that the holes (originally discussed) were accurately repaired. The owner had mentioned the crew would go to re-visit and fix the holes that I had found basically doing their job for them. I had anticipated that this would be done immediately but it wasn't until a recent rainfall that my tenants had informed me that the roof was leaking again!

As much as I enjoy staying on top of tradesmen there is some degree of responsibility that they should have to actually complete the work. I should not have to chase them to ensure that a hole in the roof is repaired before the next large rainfall after already climbing the roof to show them what a poor job the repairman did. At this point I've engaged another crew to repair the roof, subsequent damages to the living room ceiling were made after this poor repair and I've asked for a refund where i've been told that this is their standard service fee.

Regardless of your standard fee if you've done a poor job fix it, credit your dissatisfied customer back and sort the issue promptly. Do not tell people "you're on the schedule." Show some urgency! Extremely disappointing. Please stick to new roofs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDG-uafNw&fid=0x0:0x6a1d0308dbf4f933"],"When":"2021-11-25"},{"Name":"Doug Carlson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCb8sHi_LV-aOQaWY59Pu-bwUVVa9f7au74UIKVx0q9ouSmlxABA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent workmanship, professional service and they are very quick to work.  We had issues with some leaking vents and the team at Dykstra Knight was very quick to respond to ensure we weren't left with water damage.

The crew cleaned up after them selves, it's like they were never here!  Except now my roof is in top shape.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Elaine Burton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdjKFrlKwLEfOTjWxCnHfdM0QFX9qCoP3hLXBAoFjigjqxPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We hired OnSide to do a planned renovation, not an emergency insurance repair, and would highly recommend them.  We initially approached them because one of the project managers is a friend. That got them in the door for the estimate, but what won them the job was their reasonable cost and excellent timelines. Everything went to plan.

From the initial estimate until the last day, we found them to be professional, efficient, and punctual. They started on the day they said they would and finished when they said they would.  The only thing that went over budget were some unexpected electrical repairs that only became apparent once the drywall came down. The job was finished weeks before the other companies we spoke to said they could even get started. Dave, who did most of the work, was a pleasure to have around the house – cheerful and hard-working.  Dust management and final cleanup was very good.

There were a couple of minor blips in communication, but they sorted themselves out quickly and had no effect on the work. This was just about the smoothest contractor experience we have had locally.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Norman Krupa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGiXAtgq9PQj7sGKSCnfb9JWfNbO4RyZKNZ84QtNrley3OcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would highly recommend On Side Restoration Services. However, when I went to the till, the cashier rang it through at $3.99. I showed her a photo of the price tag and asked why the price had increased by one dollar, but she informed me that she could not adjust it because “the computer shows this price,” and she left it at that.

Immediately after I walked away, I noticed the cashier go inside with a marker, seemingly to change or cover the original price tag.

This experience was disappointing because the posted price should be honoured, and changes should not be made only after a customer points it out.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tom Austin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8bat7gczKEaw8KMA_IhNLc4UKwP_9jb8fIDVPRusmgD4GCA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I personally like this store. title: Woods & Son Construction
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Daniel Garrity","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdqMQDjiPXJV5EfoPyYUvuF0vSMYN3jmM1VhQbnTkKeSyHfXpx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Woods & Son to transform our deck, and the results far exceeded our expectations. Nathan and his crew removed the old railings—which weren’t up to code—and completely reimagined the space. They doubled the size of the deck, added new supports to meet safety standards, and tied everything together into one beautiful, cohesive final product.

The craftsmanship is outstanding, and our new deck passed inspection with zero issues. This experience taught me the importance of hiring a true professional from the start. Nathan is punctual, professional, and keeps a clean worksite throughout the project. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Woods & Sons to anyone in need of a contractor—his work speaks for itself!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Matuszewska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUECczW6dckDSFqNwa65Qm3WKnfalAD2cFJMfagPrIQqp-pC5wN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As an interior designer and product supplier  working with a contractor who is easy to collaborate with and open to reviewing design plans and using new products is invaluable and that’s exactly what I’ve experienced with Nathan from Woods & Son Construction.

We’ve now completed multiple bathroom renovations together, and each project has gone smoothly thanks to his reliability, responsiveness, and willingness to work as a team. Nathan is always available to discuss details ----changes in some cases due to the nature of renovations, and help bring my perspectives to life with quality workmanship.
- Maria
" Arcuo Interior Design Inc."","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Dekorte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWu1LBn1nom6zHcbaHEauBrbgJigWtsEHFsY_kczm4y6U124Se-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nathan has an eye for detail and a set of skills that make Woods & Son a no brainer for future projects. Great communication throughout the project and completed it within the time frame given.   If you're looking to upgrade your home,  I strongly recommend Woods & Son!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julie Asselin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIThwwDdGnjLZJrFTqLwsggaxP-pSFtZ7yMthNW2AxnAUiZ4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nathan remodeled our main bathroom, and we couldn't be happier with the results. He was great to work with—friendly, professional, and very communicative throughout the entire process. He offered several helpful suggestions that truly enhanced the design and functionality of the space. The quality of his work is excellent. We highly recommend Woods & Son Interiors to anyone considering a bathroom remodel!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jon Niskanen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq2cus4HGbwGA3pWj1UDIYL-QjzCzgzx_Jtqm6KLh9ueXKBbjs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I used Woods & Son Interiors when I wanted to renovate an incredibly dark and awful basement space, into a useable laundry and recreation area for future homeowners, as I was listing my home as soon as the renovation was complete. Nathan came up with a fantastic plan for the space, and was friendly and clear/timely with his communication throughout the process. The job was completed on time and on budget, which is hard to find these days, and turned out so well! I was able to get top dollar for my home as a result. Would recommend to anyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chloe Chase","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7ZqmS3xPBiDfet42wJOGWcYCcTNJwStgHzjiw8siThYviZw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Woods and Sons create a lattice fenced-in area for our Centre, He was wonderful to work with, his patience, efficiency, and attention to detail was all we could ask for. We now have a spectacular fence for the children to run around and play in. Woods and Sons was able to supply us with a quote and stay in that budget, his professionalism was outstanding along with his kind demeanor to the staff and children when working on the fence was beautiful to see. Thank you again, we will definitely be using Woods and Sons in any future renovations.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marco Cupelli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhsPgo0NbC-gWHLIyefX9He6YuyYFHKg6HL0QQQv17swlrxxvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the epitome of a communicative handyman that we need in this city. He is reliable and resourceful when it comes to repairing and renovating properties!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ted Krzystofczyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIHNej337pw6OtPLPl9NhKv71YNIjLQPSfnn4fsVWFGQ8cDXw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nathan does quailty work and is very professional! Not only did two girls that worked there ganged up on me when I asked for a receipt, they refused to call a manager or supervisor saying "no you wil be dealing with me" took $172 of mine refused to give me a receipt and said they cant help and to come back in 10 days if it was still an issue. They then took down all my info claiming they would call me about the issue and i never got contacted. Today im going to the store to find the employees and locate their info because they truely need to be fire. They dont know what theyre doing and they refuse to seak any help or do things properly.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6WMOQ6dXPjsJboc615XuSHykWsUMX4bDj4RrL4uQsFi1CJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The customer service here is the worst I've ever seen. Ordered a stove in store and was told the appliance would be delivered into the basement and the old appliance hauled away only to have it dropped in my driveway. When I refused delivery and tried to get a refund I spent 2 hours back in the store with an associate only to be told it would take 3 to 5 business days to process the return which ended up taking 20 days. Then when I was sent an email advising me that the return had been processed and that I could claim my refund in store, when I got there. I was told that it was processed incorrectly and I would have to come back another day to get it done. Finally to top it all off, when I spoke to the assistant manager Heidi about the situation, I was told that there was nothing they could do about that that it was a corporate matter. Still don't have a stove.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Traveller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1g8m3gmxYYX1ttObA5fj0PQCoSpuK7stcuk73vseNZFz-ivcc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good service and extensive range of tools and products","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAM9mCaVGqPHecIZtIwxjXu&fid=0x0:0x9535d67b007ee053"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Christine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqSHKLCJHxTP2Hvb8-PXNudlAZ6M1aT_zGD4sT2gFD8T86_-i2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Sunday november 9 2025

They try to overcharge me a hundred fifty dollars I only had a hundred dollars worth of stuff And they tried to charge me two fifty I called the manager and the manager laughed. Thinking it's not a big deal when I told him they should fire the cashier Everybody in line knew what he was doing Avoid going there and make sure You check your receipts and make sure you know the prices of everything your buying. Avoid going there The cashiers are crooked And it didn't seem like a random mistake neither","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tracy Toffoli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJtKQlG3QF5FwZ07iq5p3nJ-a2SG-yqhuwPj98M8bZyb9J-ug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jack from the Paint department just made this shopping trip so easy. One of the most personable experiences I have had and I told them straight out that I hope they are working every time I need anything. Jack was incredibly helpful, knowledgeable, and friendly.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brittany Gagnon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKnUJdAiGwXcXmxDCiN0kbbV6Kg7cERG9QU5NMksLWDRu-qQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We’ve had some not pleasant experiences with order picks ups and deliveries. Very frustrating considering we drive over 4 hours one way to this store.

This is not necessarily the stores fault. We also recently purchased an item that a person tampered with. They took the new parts out of it and put their old parts in it- so when we got home to install our shower kit- all used parts, people are ridiculous.

But, I must say. The times we visit we usually look for Violet, she’s been such a big help for us. She’s thorough, she knowledgeable and focuses on your needs 5 stars for her!! 5 BIG stars.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Qiannn Zhw","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW77bKKO2gPwnSiqwGri-KrfL4W6i2gi08l6MdSTiN_jh_FQuc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had an extremely bad experience at Canadian Tire. When I entered the store, a staff member asked me to leave my backpack at the front desk. I went there, but there were no lockers or a secure place to store it, so I had to place it on top of a cabinet.

While shopping, I noticed other customers were walking around with their backpacks, which made me feel singled out and treated differently. This was embarrassing and unacceptable.

I would like an explanation of your policy and why I was the only one asked to leave my backpack. Please look into this incident and let me know what steps you will take to prevent this from happening again.

Update:
Hello, thanks very much for your reply and apology.
I understand and respect your backpack check-in policy. My concern is not the policy itself, but how it was enforced in the moment. Being stopped and asked to leave my backpack at the front in a very public way made me feel singled out and humiliated. When I saw other shoppers carrying bags who were not approached in the same way, it felt like I was being treated differently. That experience left me feeling hurt, very upset, and honestly angry. It also made me question whether discrimination played a role.

To prevent this from happening again, please make the policy clearly posted at the entrance and ensure staff apply it consistently to all customers. I hope no one will suffer the same situation as me in the future.

Thanks,
Qiannn","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Raj Patel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLp515ruYPErWpWwcbt-XWfLFy8vtr4QCLRlddvkN7kiVZ1Pg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at Canadian Tire thanks to Akshay. I was searching for a specific lug nut socket and had already visited the store twice. Other staff told me it was unavailable or would need to be ordered and could take a week because of Christmas.

The next day, Akshay was on shift and he immediately understood what I needed. He found the exact part within 20 seconds. He was very helpful, professional, and knowledgeable.

Really appreciate his effort and customer service. Employees like Akshay make a big difference. Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"josh robinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZ_AW24XuLQ34QLknWLvEz8H-oosMw_Cg_m_A5QlyZ6gVMCA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Was told I needed $180 wheel alignment (I know I don’t it was done last month) when I went to the service desk to inquire I was treated very poor for simply wanting to inquire as to why they recommended an alignment. Upon further inspection they had not looked at my car and had the complete wrong vehicle with my info under it. When I asked the manager about how this happened and told him there is no way my car needed a alignment he insisted that most cars need a alignment and his system way correct (even though he know that he had the wrong car) he simply refused my business and said that he would get my keys. He in-fact did not get my keys he went out front and got my car (where it was parked the whole time) and put it on his alignment system to prove that he was correct. He said that he was our text me the results ( alignment was perfect) 0/5 stars … go anywhere else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris LeBlanc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDpsFvHAqDe4kUvqjnX6o-ZpCfQFrklQYuiFtK4Rtuum3_27o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I come to this Canadian tire regularly and I've never had a bad experience. Recently I've had multiple bit sockets snap and this store and specifically Jeffery the sales manager has made the warranty process easy and simple. I've always received excellent customer service from this location and it's greatly appreciated.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yoko Laguna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsgdRHuURF7cYyczhA1yIpHkuo-oPCUXdliDAM4RzcwVkBk7YO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were there for an unexpected winter tire purchase for our road trip to BC. Reno was a huge road trip life saver. He gave expert advice, very quick wit and positive attitude, and was even able to squeeze us in so we could get back on the road with minimal delays. I highly recommend seeing Reno in the Auto Parts and Service department. He has a great team in the shop. I would stop by again going through Thunder Bay on our next trip. Thank you Reno!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesse Einarson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbkOheDRZqpDh_9aayYG7uvhZzdKuZ3lLcMvkvB-FsHC1eWw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Got my brakes done plus a bunch of other front end work that costed me 2800. Drove my truck 240km and the caliper fell off while driving down highway 61. Tried to stop and the pedal went to the floor. Had to use the E brake to stop my truck before rear ending someone. Service Manager acted like he did me a favour by not charging to fix their mess up. Picked up my truck and they clearly didn’t bleed the brakes. Requested my money back for the original labour and was told no. Requested corporate to have the owners contact me but no call. Jason and Karen all I want is my money back so I can take my truck to a trusted mechanic to look over the work your store completed (or didn’t complete because that’s clearly what happened).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDLiFi4hi6s_sCsvYtTC4xW&fid=0x0:0x347547d02d2c7bb1"],"When":"2025-8-3"},{"Name":"Goutham Reddy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLtlpKnNfhL6rBSEHGgMBjYnWWEpJOqYYMMFFuCmin_kxa7Dg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolutely terrible experience. I went in for a simple oil change on my BMW, and the technician clearly had no idea what they were doing. Their lack of basic knowledge ended up costing me $200 for the service and then another $400 at certified dealership to fix the damage they caused. A routine oil change turned into an expensive headache because of pure incompetence. If you don’t know how to service BMWs, don’t pretend you do.

Placed a pickup order through the app that showed the item as in stock. Drove all the way to the store, only to be told nothing was available and the order was cancelled on the spot. Complete waste of my time. If your inventory system is this inaccurate, stop offering pickup orders altogether.

Poor service, untrained staff, and zero respect for customers. I won’t be coming back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWY3hajGw0R-yScssqVVvxisj9sL7RxoJ9bewhIhACCIlm3LM2B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Quality of customer service has declined quite drastically from this Canadian Tire over the last year or so.

1. A thing I noticed is that I hardly ever see “older adults” working at this location, just teenagers or young adults. So sometimes they don’t really know what they’re doing, and they appear clueless.

2. The hunting department sucks here, because they constantly “lose the keys” or the person who works this department doesn’t work much on the weekends/evenings. So sometimes you’re waiting 20+ minutes for the guy just to get there. Unfortunately not everyone has the time to stand and wait.

3. You can never get into contact with the automotive department via phone, no matter what time of day you’re calling.
Called and complained to customer service, so they paged someone from that department to answer the phone, but once they answered they put me on hold for over 5 minutes anyways.

4. They have employees that wander the store to try to get you to sign up for their credit card, but they don’t take no for an answer. I had to ask the employee if they understood what consent was and what no meant, because they kept harassing me.

Used to love coming to this Canadian Tire, but not anymore.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Every department in this store has been incredibly helpful, every time!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Louis Amber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxMMQ1FLecJWv9V9sHIMjsyIWbJzxhNevSqssUjgHOaSM_yw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If something goes wrong with your purchase, prepare to spend a lot of time you don't have.

It must be noted, most employees are amazing and are just trying to do their job, they deserve the praise they get. The manager, however, seems like he likes to create drama where it doesn't exist.

It was one of the most bizarre conversations I've ever had on with phone with someone -- it's like the manager was saying things that didn't match the conversation, just to have some drama for the ears of others on his end.  -- Very bizarre and creepy.

As a person that does not have free time, I am taking time I don't have to write this in the hopes it disabuses this manager from doing the same to others!

And if there is an issue with your purchase, be prepared to waste a lot of time -- and don't be generous with any feedback about it, the manager will try to destroy you, lol.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoXPLuprwXGS5oAaWV3tvi3VgEZxZSP7THgLwm48esjT3SVl9F=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Not really sure what the lady with short hair working the E PickUp counters problem is but she was absolutely miserable and rude. So after wasting a substantial amount of time I went on Amazon and bought the exact same ones for the same price as their sale price with Prime and they will be here tomorrow.  This has happened multiple times to me at this location. Honestly I wonder how this place is still in business.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Blaquiere","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqHHtqaPsYvtb_Ub8c0pUoHzybUDyuV5WNEJWurMche52b5w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went in with my father two months ago to get him an IPad; I wondered over to take a curious look at Phone prices since I was looking to replace mine that had been damaged and I wasn’t having luck on marketplace, where I have always gotten my electronics. I was looking at the oldest model on the floor since I am a university student with a tight budget. The employee, Usman, was extremely helpful and told me about a great deal that was going on, he helped me switch providers (which saved me hundreds of dollars) and answered any questions that I had. He told me all the perks that came with buying my phone, I got the newest IPhone and in the end it cost less than the oldest models on the floor!

He left a very positive mark and made mine and my father’s experience very pleasant! I will be coming back to Best Buy for all future purchases!","Images":null,"When":""}]
